title: PAI: The Life OS for AI-Powered Development
summary: PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure) is a Life OS built on Claude Code that maintains persistent memory across development sessions, preserving project architecture, coding standards, and decisions. It includes custom skills, structured workflows, a Pulse dashboard, and a seven-phase algorithm for observe, think, plan, build, execute, verify, and learn cycles.
writeup: The video covers PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure), a Life OS built on Claude Code that maintains persistent memory across development sessions, retaining project architecture, coding standards, and prior decisions. It matters because most coding assistants lose context between sessions, forcing repeated re-explanation of a project's structure and conventions. Key components include custom skills, structured workflows, and a Pulse dashboard. PAI also runs a seven-phase algorithm covering observe, think, plan, build, execute, verify, and learn.
